suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the auth flow section to document that useAuth is now backed by a React Context (AuthProvider) in use-auth.tsx, wrapping the root layout. Workers modifying auth flow should use the Context pattern rather than creating parallel auth state. The file was renamed from use-auth.ts to use-auth.tsx.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature frontend-auth-refactor refactored useAuth from per-instance useState+useEffect to an AuthProvider Context. Future workers unaware of this may accidentally create a parallel auth state or revert to the old per-instance pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document useSyncExternalStore as a recommended pattern for SSR-safe hydration guards (e.g., mounted detection). It avoids both the hydration mismatch and the react-hooks/set-state-in-effect lint violation that a naive useState+useEffect mounted pattern triggers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature frontend-auth-refactor used useSyncExternalStore in auth-guard.tsx for mounted detection — getServerSnapshot returns false (SSR+hydration) while getSnapshot returns true (post-hydration). This is non-obvious but correct for Next.js SSR.
